Title: User logs in successfully with correct credentials
Preconditions: User exists and has valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User sends login message to Device with valid username and password
2. Device authenticates the user
3. Device grants access to the user
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully

Title: User fails to log in with incorrect password
Preconditions: User exists but has invalid password
Test Steps:
1. User sends login message to Device with valid username and incorrect password
2. Device attempts to authenticate the user
3. Device denies access due to incorrect password
Expected Result: User is not logged in and receives an error message

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps:
1. User initiates logout operation
2. Device processes the logout request
3. Device revokes access for the user
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully

Title: Access ElencoSerre without errors
Test Steps:
1. User accesses ElencoSerre
2. ElencoSerre performs op() operation
Expected Result: ElencoSerre operation completes without errors

Title: Click "Seme" and visualize Esquito
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Seme"
2. ElencoSerre performs op() operation
3. ElencoSerre visualizes Esquito
Expected Result: Esquito visualization is successful

Title: Insert valid value into Aggiunta Serra
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices"
2. User selects a valid value
3. Aggiunta Serra performs valore_inserito() operation
4. Aggiunta Serra confirms value insertion
Expected Result: Value is inserted successfully into Aggiunta Serra

Title: Handle error during value insertion into Aggiunta Serra
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices"
2. User selects an invalid value
3. Aggiunta Serra performs valore_erratore() operation
4. Aggiunta Serra rejects value insertion
Expected Result: Value insertion fails and an error message is displayed

Title: Perform operation through Sera and SeraConnesso

2. Sera connects to SeraConnesso
